title: How I Turn 15-Second Clips Into A 5-Figure YouTube Shorts

transcript.text: Your shorts generate you $32,000 [music] a month. >> Damn. >> In shorts revenue. And shorts revenue they usually pay like a 7 cent RPM. >> Yeah, we're at a dollar. >> No way he's making a dollar, but YouTube shorts has been making me [music] anywhere from 100 to 200 dollars for every million views. And some months I get over 300 million, which rounds up to $50,000 a month. So here's how I do it so you can do it, too. First [music] thing that you need to understand is the more competitors you have, the less views each and every one of you will get on average. So while everyone is doing long-form, shorts because shorts make less money, which is true. But getting millions of views is so easy with shorts that anyone can [music] do it. For example, that video of mine got 130 million views and made me $8,000. This one with almost 100 million views made me $7,700. [music] And I've got plenty of others getting tens of millions of views on multiple channels of mine. So if you want to [music] know exactly how to turn 15-second clips into five-figure salaries, then comment the word class and I'll send you a free class on exactly how the system works.
